data.body: sprint-next-batch.sh line 55 sets TK=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/tk but the tk wrapper no longer exists. The script uses $TK show to load epic details (line 160) and fails with 'Could not load epic'. This is a v2 reference that will be fixed by task 3ebc-c664 in epic d775-4a36 (the v2 removal epic). Current workaround: manual batch composition via ticket list + deps.
